{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Narakan way
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Narakan way]] involves seeing retribution as just.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
